overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete may not be enforceable under CA law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may be able to operate competing businesses immediately after termination

overrides.override_summary: WA governing law may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: CA law may apply instead of WA law

overrides.override_summary: No waiver of CA franchise law claims including fraud in inducement
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee retains right to sue under CA franchise law

overrides.override_summary: Forum outside IL void
overrides.why_it_matters: IL franchisees can sue in IL, not forced to WA

overrides.override_summary: Governing law provision void
overrides.why_it_matters: IL law applies

overrides.override_summary: General release cannot cover MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees retain fraud/disclosure claims on renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: May file civil lawsuit in MD for MD law violations
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees not forced to WA courts for state claims

overrides.override_summary: ALL initial fees deferred until franchisor completes pre-opening obligations due to financial condition concerns
overrides.why_it_matters: CRITICAL — MD regulator has determined franchisor financial condition is questionable. Franchisees have payment protection.

overrides.override_summary: 90 days notice of termination (60 days to cure); 180 days notice of non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisees get much longer cure periods than standard 30 days

overrides.override_summary: Litigation outside MN may be prohibited
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisees may litigate in MN

overrides.override_summary: General release prohibited as condition of renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisees retain all claims at renewal

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require liquidated damages, termination penalties, or judgment notes
overrides.why_it_matters: Early termination damages formula may be unenforceable in MN

overrides.override_summary: Release on renewal/transfer may not apply to NY General Business Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchisees retain Article 33 claims

overrides.override_summary: Forum outside NY void for NY law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchisees can sue in NY

overrides.override_summary: Noncompete may be unenforceable under ND Century Code §9-08-06
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees may freely compete post-term

overrides.override_summary: Forum outside ND void
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees litigate in ND

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages and termination penalties void. Exemplary/punitive damages waiver void. Limitation of claims void.
overrides.why_it_matters: ND broadly limits franchisor's ability to impose penalties

overrides.override_summary: Governing law outside ND void
overrides.why_it_matters: ND law applies

overrides.override_summary: General release on renewal void
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees retain claims at renewal

overrides.override_summary: Forum outside RI void for RI Franchise Investment Act claims
overrides.why_it_matters: RI franchisees can sue in RI

overrides.override_summary: Cannot cancel franchise without reasonable cause
overrides.why_it_matters: VA provides additional termination protections

overrides.override_summary: Release cannot include WA Franchise Investment Protection Act rights unless negotiated settlement with independent counsel
overrides.why_it_matters: WA franchisees retain FIPA rights

overrides.override_summary: Noncompete void for employees earning <$100k/yr and contractors earning <$250k/yr (adjusted for inflation)
overrides.why_it_matters: Most store-level employees exempt from noncompete in WA

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration/mediation must be in WA or mutually agreed. Franchisee may bring action in WA.
overrides.why_it_matters: WA franchisees protected from out-of-state forum
